name: bitmap
description: Low-level bitmap and pixel manipulation primitives. Based on iospharo BitBltPlugin, B2DPlugin (Balloon 2D), FloatArrayPlugin, and SurfacePlugin.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: bitmap-create
primitives.description: Create a blank bitmap. Inputs: width, height. Output: bitmap handle.

primitives.name: bitmap-fill
primitives.description: Fill entire bitmap with a color. Inputs: bitmap, color integer (ARGB). Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: bitmap-get-pixel
primitives.description: Read a pixel value. Inputs: bitmap, x, y. Output: color integer (ARGB).

primitives.name: bitmap-set-pixel
primitives.description: Write a pixel value. Inputs: bitmap, (x,y list), color integer (ARGB). Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: bitmap-width
primitives.description: Get bitmap width. Input: bitmap. Output: integer.

primitives.name: bitmap-height
primitives.description: Get bitmap height. Input: bitmap. Output: integer.

primitives.name: bitblt-copy
primitives.description: BitBlt copy operation: copy a rectangular region from source to destination. Inputs: dest bitmap, source bitmap, rect (x,y,w,h list). Output: dest bitmap.

primitives.name: bitblt-blend
primitives.description: BitBlt alpha blend: composite source onto dest with alpha. Inputs: dest bitmap, source bitmap, position (x,y list). Output: dest bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-draw-line
primitives.description: Draw a line on a bitmap (Balloon 2D). Inputs: bitmap, start (x,y list), end (x,y list). Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-draw-rect
primitives.description: Draw a rectangle outline. Inputs: bitmap, origin (x,y list), size (w,h list). Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-fill-rect
primitives.description: Fill a rectangle with color. Inputs: bitmap, rect (x,y,w,h list), color integer. Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-draw-oval
primitives.description: Draw an oval outline in a bounding rect. Inputs: bitmap, rect (x,y,w,h list), color integer. Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-fill-oval
primitives.description: Fill an oval in a bounding rect. Inputs: bitmap, rect (x,y,w,h list), color integer. Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-draw-polygon
primitives.description: Draw a polygon from a list of points. Inputs: bitmap, points list (list of x,y lists). Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: b2d-draw-bezier
primitives.description: Draw a cubic Bezier curve. Inputs: bitmap, control points (4-element list of x,y lists), color integer. Output: bitmap.

primitives.name: color-rgb
primitives.description: Create ARGB color from R, G, B components (0-255). Inputs: red, green, blue. Output: color integer.

primitives.name: color-rgba
primitives.description: Create ARGB color from R, G, B, A. Inputs: red, green, blue (0-255 each in a list), alpha (0-255). Output: color integer.

primitives.name: float-array-add
primitives.description: Element-wise addition of two float arrays (SIMD accelerated). Inputs: array A, array B. Output: result array.

primitives.name: float-array-mul
primitives.description: Element-wise multiplication of two float arrays (SIMD accelerated). Inputs: array A, array B. Output: result array.

primitives.name: float-array-scale
primitives.description: Scale a float array by a scalar value. Inputs: array, scalar. Output: result array.

primitives.name: float-array-sum
primitives.description: Sum all elements of a float array. Input: array. Output: sum.
